Platform: Transit shelter DOOH
Required canvas: 1080 x 1920 px
Required aspect ratio: 9:16 vertical
Old conflicting platform to ignore: Instagram square 1080 x 1080.
Top safe zone: 160 px.
Bottom safe zone: 220 px.
Side safe margin: 88 px.
Logo: top-left below transit shelter top safe zone.
CTA: bottom-right above QR/source safe zone.
Text density: no more than 6 short text blocks; headline should be largest and at most 2 lines.
Hero: must stay readable without covering CTA, disclosure, or source line.
